title: pseudoliparis curvatula
side_effects: Pseudoliparis curvatula can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain. Additionally, improper use may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching, in some individuals. If not used correctly, pseudoliparis curvatula may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
